summary: Comprehensive testing of Tennis Buddies Club new features - Match History page with player filter working perfectly, Chatroom functionality fully operational, Round Robin API working correctly, session management issues persist affecting protected routes

ui_bugs.issue: User sessions expire quickly during navigation, causing redirects to login page when accessing protected routes like Availability page

integration_issues.issue: Availability page not accessible due to session expiration - users get redirected to login page

passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with proper title and navigation
Navigation shows History link prominently in main nav
Navigation shows Chat link for authenticated users only (correct behavior)
Match History page loads and displays correctly
Match History page has working player filter dropdown with multiple players
Match History page shows both 'Match History' and 'Player Stats' tabs
Match History page displays match data (1 match found)
Player filter dropdown shows 15+ test users indicating active system usage
User registration flow working correctly
User authentication successful after registration
Chatroom page accessible via Chat navigation link for authenticated users
Chatroom displays correct title 'CLUB CHATROOM'
Chatroom shows existing messages (1 message from 'Chat Test User')
Chatroom has proper message input field and send button
Chatroom shows 'Messages are visible to all club members' notice
Backend API - All 21 endpoints working (100% success rate)
Match History API working (/match-history endpoint)
Player Stats API working (/player-stats endpoint)
Chatroom API working (requires authentication as expected)
Round Robin Generation API working (requires admin authentication as expected)
Schedule API working (returns empty list correctly)
AI Chat API functionality (GPT-5.2 integration working)
Stats dashboard showing correct data (17 members, 0 teams, 1 match)
action_item_for_main_agent: Critical Issue: Fix session management and authentication state persistence. Users are getting logged out during navigation which prevents access to protected routes like Availability page. The new features (Match History with player filter, Chatroom) are working perfectly, but session expiration is blocking full testing of protected routes. Consider implementing proper JWT token refresh, session persistence, or reviewing token expiration settings.

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All APIs working perfectly including new Match History, Player Stats, and Chatroom APIs
success_percentage.frontend: 85% - New features (Match History, Chatroom) working perfectly, session management issues preventing full protected route testing
